goal: Audit and fix the Aether update/distribution system so companion files always sync correctly, verify the pheromone pipeline works end-to-end, and ensure the system is production-ready

phases.description: Remove stale worktrees, add update/install tests, fix setup protection parity
phases.name: Cleanup and Distribution Tests
success_criteria: setup has same protection as update

tasks.goal: Remove 5 remaining stale worktrees from cmd/.aether/worktrees/
Add update command tests covering normal overwrite, dry-run, force, and protected dirs
Add protected-dirs/files params to setupSyncDir matching update pattern
success_criteria: setup respects data/ and dreams/ boundaries

tasks.goal: End-to-end install->setup->update flow test in temp directory
success_criteria: All three commands succeed; changes propagate

phases.description: Verify the full pheromone lifecycle with integration tests: write, read, prime, display, expire, dedup
phases.name: Pheromone Pipeline Verification

tasks.goal: Create integration test for full pheromone lifecycle (write->read->prime->display->expire)
Test colony-prime includes pheromone signals in assembled context
success_criteria: Pheromone section appears in colony-prime output

tasks.goal: Test pheromone deduplication reinforces instead of duplicating
success_criteria: Second write returns replaced:true, only 1 signal exists

phases.description: Fix colony-prime to include hive wisdom and user preferences (currently only in pr-context). Test budget enforcement and priority-based trimming.
phases.name: Colony-Prime Context Parity
success_criteria: colony-prime has parity with pr-context for wisdom/preferences

tasks.goal: Add hive wisdom and user preferences loading to colony-prime context assembly
success_criteria: colony-prime output includes HIVE WISDOM and USER PREFERENCES sections

tasks.goal: Test colony-prime respects 8000-char budget and trims low-priority sections first
Test compact mode uses 4000-char budget with correct trimming order
success_criteria: Compact mode trims correctly by priority

phases.description: Fix colony-state.template.json to remove dead __PLACEHOLDER__ values. Document that init_cmd.go constructs state directly. Verify init produces clean state.
phases.name: Template and Placeholder Cleanup
success_criteria: No placeholder strings in templates or generated state

tasks.goal: Update colony-state.template.json replacing __PLACEHOLDER__ with example values and add usage note
Add test that init creates COLONY_STATE.json with zero placeholder strings
Document or remove pheromone-snapshot-inject and pheromone-merge-back placeholder commands
success_criteria: Commands either implemented or marked deferred in help text

phases.description: Run full test suite with race detection, verify build, and smoke test the complete flow
phases.name: Production Readiness Verification

tasks.goal: Run full test suite with race detection (go test ./... -race)
Run go vet and build verification

success_criteria: All commands produce valid JSON with expected fields

learnings.claim: Pheromone deduplication had an off-by-one bug: ReinforcementCount initialized to 1 instead of 0, causing first reinforcement to read as 2
learnings.evidence: 8 dedup tests confirmed the fix works correctly after changing initial value to 0

learnings.claim: pheromone-display outputs text table before JSON envelope, requiring first-brace extraction for test parsing
learnings.evidence: 10 lifecycle tests parse display output by finding first brace character

learnings.claim: colony-prime --compact correctly injects pheromone signals into assembled context with type markers [FOCUS] [REDIRECT] [FEEDBACK]
learnings.evidence: TestColonyPrime_IncludesPheromoneSignals verifies all three types appear with formatted content

learnings.claim: colony-prime can share readHiveWisdom and readUserPreferences helpers with pr-context for code reuse
learnings.evidence: Both commands use the same helpers from context.go, maintaining parity

learnings.claim: Priority-based budget trimming works by sorting sections ascending and fitting within budget
learnings.evidence: 17 budget tests verify trim order: learnings(2) < decisions(3) < hive(4) < state(5) < instincts(6) < prefs(7) < pheromones(9)

learnings.claim: Stub commands should be marked Deprecated in Cobra to hide from help while remaining accessible
learnings.evidence: pheromone-snapshot-inject and pheromone-merge-back marked deprecated, 4 tests verify

learnings.claim: Templates should have concrete example values, not fill-in-the-blank placeholders, to serve as reference
learnings.evidence: TestInitCmd_NoPlaceholderStrings verifies generated state has zero placeholder patterns

learnings.claim: state-mutate can corrupt the events field by writing the jq expression as a literal string instead of evaluating it
learnings.evidence: COLONY_STATE.json events field was a string containing the jq expression; fixed by passing events array via --argjson

learnings.claim: Test assertions should accept variable data from real files (e.g., wisdom XML with 0+ entries) rather than hardcoded counts
learnings.evidence: TestImportWisdomFromRealShellXML expected 0 entries but real XML had 41; changed to t.Log for empty case
